item.arcane_mag.arcane_staff.tooltip.dam: §5Damage scales with Attack Damage and Spell Power
tooltip.arcane_mag.cast_hint: §e§oPress [%s] while holding a gun to cast
jei.arcane_mag.arcane_anvil.title: Arcane Anvil
spell.arcane_mag.forced_march.guide: Channel to move faster and ignore terrain. After channeling, gain Resistance and Haste.
tooltip.arcane_mag.spell_forced_march: Hold to channel, release for buffs
spell.arcane_mag.thunder_stream.guide: Release a continuous lightning beam. Longer channel time deals more damage. Movement speed is greatly reduced during casting.
spell.arcane_mag.jamming_waves.guide: Deploy a frontal jamming field. Activates after 0.5 seconds of channeling. Deflects or catches incoming projectiles, and blocks frontal melee attacks. Each successful defense consumes additional mana.
spell.arcane_mag.gun_enhance.guide: Enhance your held gun, increasing damage, fire rate, aim speed, and recoil control.
spell.arcane_mag.tactical_dash.guide: Dash forward a short distance and increase headshot damage
spell.arcane_mag.tactical_dash.info.head: Headshot Bonus: +%sx
spell.arcane_mag.smouldering_fire.guide: Swing in a close range arc. Burning enemies take increased damage. If holding a melee weapon, the spell also increases weapon damage.
spell.arcane_mag.jing_ting_jue.guide: Deal area lightning damage to target, and gain a Sunderblade charge. Damage multiplier increases with charges.
spell.arcane_mag.arcane_aim.guide: Activate the Arcane Core to lock onto targets, guaranteeing headshots within range. Cannot switch items during activation.
Release a liquid nitrogen shockwave to knock back enemies in a cone. Marked enemies take damage proportional to movement distance for 8 seconds. Knockback is reduced by target's knockback resistance.
spell.arcane_mag.lizhi_yan.guide: Summon Yinglong Heavy Fire Support (In Development)
spell.arcane_mag.fire_imbued_bullet.guid: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Damage is doubled if target is already burning. Chance to ignite target and apply Rend effect
spell.arcane_mag.fire_imbued_bullet.effe: Apply Burning for fire damage over time
spell.arcane_mag.evocation_imbued_bullet: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Chance to apply Vulnerability: all incoming damage increased, scaling with spell level
spell.arcane_mag.nature_imbued_bullet.gu: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Chance to trigger one of two effects: 1) Poison Cloud + Poison. 2) Blighted.
spell.arcane_mag.holy_imbued_bullet.guid: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Chance to summon a Holy Light ray on hit. Cannot trigger on same target within 10 seconds
spell.arcane_mag.holy_imbued_bullet.effe: %s%% chance to summon a beam of sunlight
spell.arcane_mag.blood_imbued_bullet.gui: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Lose 40% current HP when casting, increasing bullet damage. Killing targets during this time increases temporary max HP
spell.arcane_mag.lightning_imbued_bullet: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Chain lightning to nearby targets
spell.arcane_mag.ender_imbued_bullet.gui: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Chance to pull target together
spell.arcane_mag.frost_imbued_bullet.gui: Attacks deal additional school spell damage. Chance to freeze target
